questionHtml: Outline how higher octane fuels help eliminate “knocking” in engines.
markschemeHtml:
fuels can be compressed more without undergoing «unwanted» auto-ignition

 

Accept “burns smoother without undergoing «unwanted» auto-ignition” OR “fuel does not auto-ignite”.

[1 mark]

meta.title: Outline how higher octane fuels help eliminate “knocking” in engines.
